features.name: rwprobe operation on wire with ref.define
features.description: Code should include a rwprobe operation creating a read-write probe from a wire, with ref.define connecting the probe to an output port
features.snippet:
output p : RWProbe<UInt<5>>
wire x : UInt<5>
define p = rwprobe(x)

features.name: RWProbe type as module port
features.description: Code should include an RWProbe type used as a module output port

features.name: rwprobe to instance port connection via ref.define
features.description: Code should include a ref.define connecting an instance's rwprobe port to a parent module's output port
features.snippet:
inst r of R
define p = r.p
